item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Texas Instruments, United Rentals, Wex, Penn Entertainment & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves midday.

item.title: Traders are betting on big moves in Intel on earnings
item.description: Semiconductor stocks are powering the U.S. equity market to records and traders are predicting that means a big swing in shares of Intel after earning...

item.title: Risky meme trading is back. A trading rule change may have lit the fuse
item.description: A regulatory shift is expected to remove barriers to rapid-fire trading and help revive a meme-stock frenzy.

item.title: Kalshi traders don't see Strait of Hormuz traffic returning to normal until July
item.description: Chances that traffic returns to normal fell below 50% on Wednesday, according to Kalshi bettors, despite the U.S. and Iran extending the ceasefire.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Honeywell, Nokia, Netflix, IBM, Tesla & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves before the bell.
